steps.notes: Pulled all Candidate rows from AI Brief Story Pool (Notion). Found 36 Candidate rows across W22 and W23. Mapped all 7 client profiles. Grouped by client relevance. W23 stories (June 1-7) are the fresh batch; W22 stories remain as supplementary candidates from prior weeks not yet used.
actions: notion_exec: POST query data source for Status=Candidate
wrote notion-pull.json with all candididate story data

steps.notes: All 7 client briefs tailored and staged. 4-5 stories per client. Each brief opens with 'why this matters now' lede. All client sensitivities honored: KPS framed as expert leverage, ChristianaCare framed through patient safety, Luna avoids headcount/financial specifics, M&T Bank excludes pure investment banking, Alpine framed through activist dislocation lens. Stories were processed in 3 sequential batches due to provider timeouts but all 7 clients completed successfully.

All 7 branded single-page PDFs rendered successfully. Each brief: 3 items, ONE page, opens with lede, Keel3 brand colors (Navy #0F1E2E, Orange #F25C2A, Cream #F0EFE9, Slate #3A4A5C), Inter font, three-column layout, category-label pills per client.
